creator: walter@lifeforms.nl
text:
mini_sendmail 1.3.8 can suffer message corruption when using the Bcc header, which I reported to the mini_sendmail author. He just released version 1.3.9 with a fix for this problem.

A little blog entry about the bug is here: http://acme.com/updates/archive/191.html

Would be much appreciated if the port version can be bumped.
